name: Risotto with Peas and Parmigiano, Northern
recipeInstructions:
Total cooking time: 15-18 minutes.
1. In a large skillet, melt 3 tablespoons of unsalted butter over medium heat.
2. Add the minced onion and sauté until soft and translucent.
3. Stir in the Arborio rice and coat with butter.
4. Deglaze with 1 cup of dry white wine, stirring constantly until the wine is mostly reduced.
5. Gradually add 6 cups of chicken broth, one cup at a time, allowing each addition to be absorbed before adding more. Stir continuously throughout.
6. When the rice is almost al dente and the liquid is nearly gone, stir in the peas, remaining tablespoon of butter, and Parmesan cheese. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
7. The risotto should be moist but not soupy. Serve immediately.
